task_updates.executor_notes: Added test_rendered_startup_script_gates_uv_sync_on_inputs_sentinel to tests/gpu_orchestrator/runpod/test_startup_script.py. The test renders the startup script, asserts the literal .venv/.sync-inputs sentinel path, pins all five hash inputs, asserts rm-before-sync/write-after-sync ordering, and asserts the skip log appears before the uv sync invocation. Ran the full startup script test file; all 6 tests passed.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the new pytest assertion pins SYNC_SENTINEL=".venv/.sync-inputs", "$UV_BIN" --version, python: 3.10, extras: cuda124, sha256sum uv.lock, sha256sum pyproject.toml, rm-before-sync/write-after-sync ordering, and skip-log-before-sync ordering.
